post.description:
Creates a new template container.
- **payload**: The initial data (name, description, project_id).

schema.title: Response List Templates V1 Templates  Get

get.description: Retrieves a specific template by its UUID.

patch.description:
Partially updates a template (e.g., renaming or auto-saving graph JSON).
Only fields sent in the payload will be updated.

delete.description: Deletes a template and all its associated history (versions/jobs).

get.description:
Returns the template definition and its latest execution state in a single
response, giving the frontend everything it needs to render the canvas:

- **template**: workflow definition (`current_graph_json`) for graph rendering.
- **last_job**: most recent job with per-node statuses for execution overlay.
  `null` when the template has never been executed.

The frontend can use `last_job.prompt_id` to subscribe to live WS deltas
when `last_job.status` is `QUEUED` or `PROCESSING`.
Retrieves all templates associated with a specific project ID.

schema.title: Response Get Templates By Project V1 Templates Project  Project Id  Get

post.summary: Duplicate a Library Template into a Project
post.description:
Duplicates a read-only Library Template into a new editable Project Template.
No JSON body required — the backend fetches the source template and copies its graph.

parameters.name: library_template_id

schema.description: UUID of the source LibraryTemplate to clone
schema.title: Library Template Id

parameters.description: UUID of the source LibraryTemplate to clone

parameters.name: project_id

schema.description: UUID of the target Project to create the template in
schema.title: Project Id

parameters.description: UUID of the target Project to create the template in

get.description:
Returns the full schema (inputs, outputs, metadata) for every
registered node in the engine.

Returns the schema for a specific node class by name
(e.g., `GeminiNode`, `VeoVideoGenerationNode`).

post.description:
Snapshots the template's current graph into a TemplateVersion, creates a
Job + NodeExecution records, submits the graph to engine, and streams
node status updates via RabbitMQ → WebSocket Gateway → frontend.
Returns immediately with job_id and prompt_id.

Raises **422 Unprocessable Entity** if the graph contains validation
errors (e.g. missing required inputs, type mismatches).  The response
body includes a structured ``node_errors`` dict so the frontend can
highlight the broken nodes.

get.description:
Returns the persistent job record with all node execution states.
Used by the frontend on page reload to reconstruct execution state
from the DB rather than relying on volatile WS/cache state.

Returns a snapshot of the engine's volatile prompt queue:
currently running prompt(s) and pending prompts ordered by priority.

post.description:
Cancel specific pending prompts by prompt_id or clear the entire
pending queue.  Only affects pending prompts — to stop a running
graph, use ``POST /interrupt``.

Sends an interrupt signal to the engine.  If ``prompt_id`` is provided,
only that specific prompt is interrupted (if it is currently running).
Otherwise, a global interrupt is issued.

The engine sets ``processing_interrupted()`` flag, which causes
``sleep_with_interrupt`` to raise ``ProcessingInterrupted`` in the
active node's retry/poll loop.

Submits a workflow graph for asynchronous execution on the engine.
Returns immediately with a `prompt_id` — poll
`GET /history/{prompt_id}` for results.

get.summary: Get execution history for a prompt
get.description:
Returns the execution history entry for a specific prompt_id.
Returns null if no history exists for that prompt.

schema.title: Response Get Prompt History V1 Engine History  Prompt Id  Get

get.description:
Returns execution history for all prompts.
Supports optional pagination via `max_items` and `offset`.

schema.title: Response Get All History V1 Engine History Get

post.description:
Clears all execution history (if `clear=true`) and/or deletes
specific entries by prompt_id (if `delete` list is provided).

get.description: Lists all available library template cards with pagination.

schema.title: Response List Library Templates V1 Library Templates  Get

get.description: Retrieves a specific library template by its UUID.

schema.title: Response List Reference Images V1 Ambassadors  Ambassador Id  Images Get

get.summary: Get a review task by ID

post.summary: Submit user decision and resume the Temporal workflow

get.summary: Get the pending review task for a job

schema.title: Response Get Pending By Job V1 Review Job  Job Id  Pending Get

get.summary: Get the review task for a specific job + node

schema.title: Response Get By Job And Node V1 Review Job  Job Id  Node  Node Id  Get
Response List Brands V1 Brands  Get

get.description: Returns a single brand by its UUID.

patch.description: Partially updates a brand. Only provided fields are changed.

schema.title: Response List Products V1 Products  Get

Snapshots the template graph, creates a Job record, and submits execution
to Temporal. Returns immediately with the job_id.
Creates a new library template card (internal use only).

Only fields sent in the payload will be updated.

delete.description: Deletes a library template from the library (internal use only).

BrandUpdate.description:
All fields optional for PATCH semantics.
Inherits from BaseModel (NOT BrandBase) to make all fields optional.

CanvasResponse.title: CanvasResponse
CanvasResponse.description:
Single-request payload for rendering the template canvas.

Combines the workflow definition (template.current_graph_json) with the
latest execution state (last_job.node_executions) so the frontend never
needs a second round-trip.

last_job is None when the template has never been executed.

ExecutionStatus.title: ExecutionStatus
ExecutionStatus.description: Status block returned by the engine for each completed prompt.

HistoryEntry.title: HistoryEntry
HistoryEntry.description: A single prompt's execution history entry.

prompt_id.title: Prompt Id
prompt_id.description: Interrupt a specific running prompt. If omitted, interrupts the currently running prompt globally.

InterruptRequest.title: InterruptRequest
InterruptRequest.description: Optional request body for targeted interrupt.

JobDetailResponse.title: JobDetailResponse
JobDetailResponse.description: Full job details including per-node execution state.

type="dynamic" → generate via LLM using `prompt_template` (future work).

prompt.description: Workflow graph — dict of node_id → Node definition.

partial_execution_targets.title: Partial Execution Targets
partial_execution_targets.description: Execute only these output nodes (+ upstream deps). Omit to run all OUTPUT_NODE nodes.

extra_data.title: Extra Data
extra_data.description: Arbitrary metadata forwarded to nodes via hidden inputs.

number.title: Number
number.description: Queue priority (lower = higher). Auto-incremented if omitted.

PromptRequest.description: Request body for submitting a workflow graph for execution.

queue_pending.title: Queue Pending
queue_pending.description: Prompts waiting to be executed (ordered by priority).

QueueInfoResponse.title: QueueInfoResponse
QueueInfoResponse.description: Snapshot of the engine's volatile prompt queue.

QueueItem.title: QueueItem
QueueItem.description:
Parsed representation of the engine's prompt queue-item tuple.

The engine stores this as a 5-element tuple:
    (number, prompt_id, prompt, extra_data, outputs_to_execute)
The model_validator converts the tuple into named fields on arrival.

delete.title: Delete
delete.description: List of prompt_ids to remove from the pending queue.

clear.title: Clear
clear.description: If true, clear all pending prompts from the queue.

QueueManageRequest.title: QueueManageRequest
QueueManageRequest.description: Request body for managing the engine's prompt queue.
